prompt:
A high-fashion graphic editorial poster featuring three models in an avant-garde electronic music setting.

In the center foreground, a model with sharp white bob hair, round red-framed sunglasses, and over-ear metallic headphones stands facing forward with a confident, minimal expression. The model wears a long, oversized bright orange-red trench coat over a dark grey turtleneck and matching loose-fitting trousers with clean white sneakers.
To the left, a second model stands in profile, looking left, wearing a flat cap, glasses, a dark red jacket, and loose dark trousers. To the right, a third model stands looking toward the right, wearing dark sunglasses and an all-black oversized streetwear jacket and pants.

The background is a minimalist light grey, dominated by a massive, perfect solid red circle directly behind the central model. The entire lower composition features stacks of large, retro-futuristic electronic sound speaker woofers and boomboxes painted in a matching vibrant orange-red.

The image features clean, abstract graphic design elements like thin vertical lines, small white circular accents, and subtle technical text overlays. The aesthetic is a blend of constructivism, modern streetwear fashion, and cinematic electronic album art, using a bold, restricted color palette of bright red-orange, charcoal grey, white, and a light grey background. Ultra-detailed, sharp focus, studio lighting.

Aspect ratio is 9:16
